titleStmt.title: SII 9.215: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 215. (A.R. No. 229 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT DUGGAVATTI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1049, Parābhva, Pausha, śu. pāḍiva, Ādivāra. Parābhava (= Śaka 1049 current) Pausha śu. 1 corresponded to A.D. 1126 December 16 Thursday, not Sunday, as stated. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that his feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noṇambavāḍi thirty-twothousand from Bēluṟavu. The Maleyāḷa Vaḍḍavyavahāri Nambig-Anṇiśeṭṭi, who was administering Duggati in Bikkiga seventy, a sub-division of Kōgaḷi five-hundred, Brammadēvayya-Nāyaka of Brahmavaṁśa, who was the Ūroḍeya of Duggati, the Mahāpradhāna Daṇḍanāyaka Indirāṇa Chaṭṭayya and the Daṇḍanāyaka Chōdhāda, who was in charge of the toll-revenue of Kōgaḷi are stated to have made a gift of land and a portion of the toll-revenue for the service of the god Mahādēva in Duggati. Nambig-Aṇṇiseṭṭi is said to have done this with a desire to help the dharma of Chīliseṭṭi. Malliyaṇṇa wrote and Annōja engraved the inscription. A certain Bīradēva is also stated to have made a gift of land for the service of the god Billēśvara in Duggati.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śsaṁbhuvē . Ōṁ namaśśivāya
svasti . sakanripakāḷātītasaṁvatsarasataṁgaḷu sāyirada nālvattoṁ
bhattaneya parābhavasaṁvatsarada pausya suddha pāḍiva Ādivāra
daṁduttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇanimitta svasti samastabhuvanāsraya
śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvaru prithivīrājyaṁgeye
tatupādapadmōpajīvi svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṁ
ḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subha
ṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa paricchēdigaṁḍa rājiga
cōḷamanōbhaṁga śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁga śrī
manmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuvanamalladēvapāṁḍyadēvaru noṇaṁba
vāḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipāḷanadi bēluṟu
vina nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttire svastisamastavastuviṣayavyāpāraniyatanuṁ vastugu
ṇasaṁpannanu nuḍidumattennanuvāsritaciṁtāmaṇiyuṁ vya
vahāraśikhāmaṇiyumaṣṭādasapaṭṭaṇasamuddharaṇanu samaya
samuddharaṇanu sāradādēvīlabdhavaraprasādanu śrīmaddēsiyaṁka
kāṟanu śrīmaṁnānādēsimaleyāḷavaḍḍavyavahāri naṁbigaṇnise
ṭṭiyaru kōgaḷiyayinūṟaṟa baḷiya bikkiganēḷpattaṟoḷadhiggrāma
duggatiyaṁ sukhadiṁ mēlāḷkegeyyuttamire svasti samastavastu
viṣayabyāpāraniyatanu samastavastuguṇasaṁpaṁnanu śiva
pādasēkharanu samayasamuddharaṇanu śrīsāradādēvīlabdha
varaprasādanuvappa cīliseṭṭiyaru māḍisida dharmmakkanukūlate
yu taddharmmābhilāsitarumāgi © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāya
dhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannarppannagasa
yanahridayakamaḷamukuḷamukuḷitōtpattibrahmavaṁśōdbhavanuṁ
vājikuḷāṁbararājanu caladaṁkarāmanu śrīmannāḷprabhu duggati
yūroḍeya brammadēvayyanākayaru śrīmanmahāvaḍḍavyava
hāri naṁbigaṇniseṭṭiyaru samastaprajegaḷuviḷdu mahādēvargge biṭṭa ga
ḷde kamma Eṁṭanūṟu beḷdale Ere mattar mūṟu naṁdādīvigege gāṇeṇne
yoṁdu © svasti samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmārttyapadavī
virājamānamānōṁnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhasaktitrayasaṁpa
nnarappa śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ pracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyaka kadaṁbaḷike sā
yira kōgaḷiyayinūṟaṟaccupaṁnāyavaḍḍarāvuḷadadhiṣṭāya
ka sāvāsi yiṁdirāṇacaṭṭayyaṁgaḷu samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanma
hāpradhānaṁ śrīsvayaṁbhusōmēśvaradēvapādābjabhrimganeppa kadaṁbaḷike
sāyira kōgaḷiyayinūṟaṟa hejjuṁkada dhiṣṭhāyaka daṁḍanāyaka cōdhā
daruviḷdu mahādēvargge duggatiya taḷada bhaṁḍadalu sārigeyaloṁdu
lakka Aḍakeya suṁkava nivēdyake biṭṭaru teṁkaṇabaṭṭeya kāraḍake me
ḷasu sārigeyalu nālku hēṟu davasada sārigeyalāṟu hēṟuvaṁ biṭṭa
ru naṁdādīvigege pannāyadalli Īṁdirāṇacaṭṭayyaṁgaḷu barisakke paṁ
neraḍu paṇava biṭṭaru Ī dharmmamanārōrvvaradhikāravaṁ paḍedavaru
keḍalīyide pratipālisidavaru kurukṣētradaluṁ bāṇarā
siyalu sāīra kavileya kōḍukoḷagamaṁ poṁnalu kaṭṭisi brā
hmaṇarggaṁ tapōdhanarggaṁ dānaṁgeyda phalamakkuvidanaḷidavarā sthāna
dā kavileyuva brāhmaṇaruva tapōdhanaruvanaḷida pātakavakku
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . saṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrā
ṇi Īṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ © śrīsarasvatīgaṇachā
tra malliyaṇnana barapaṁ . khaṇḍarisidannōjaṁ ©
tāṟiyahaḷḷa diṁ mūḍa telagiya bīradēva duggati
ya billēsvaradēvargge Aṁgabhōgakke biṭṭa keyyi
mattaru nakku
Digital edition of SII 9.215 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
